text:
Here’s the Python code to compute the largest year-over-year change as a positive integer:  

```python
data = [(2018, 100), (2019, 120), (2020, 80), (2021, 150), (2022, 200)]

max_change = 0
for i in range(1, len(data)):
    change = abs(data[i][1] - data[i-1][1])
    if change > max_change:
        max_change = change

print(max_change)
```
